stemHtml: Clear ice develops when large supercooled droplets impact aircraft surfaces and freeze slowly. What atmospheric conditions favor clear ice formation?

options.a: Temperatures between 0°C and -10°C with small droplets in stratus clouds.
options.b: Temperatures between 0°C and -15°C with large droplets in cumuliform clouds or freezing rain.
options.c: Temperatures below -20°C with small droplets in cirrus clouds.
